meaning: n.鸭子,急忙蹲下,闪避,<俚> 人,家伙vi.没入水中,闪避vt.猛按...入水,躲避
examples: The main course was roast duck.
She chose a bench beside the duck pond and sat down.
The cat was now within striking distance of the duck.
And the next ball was too much for Hoggard, bowled for a golden duck.
Its novel menu has featured items such as steamed glutinous rice with duck jus.
